title: Question about the "openPlanSelection" in the SDK
excerpt:

posts.author: seriksk1 (Serhii Skorin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m not sure why but when I’m trying to use “openPlanSelection” it opens the plans page but doesn’t preselect plan I’m putting as a parameter “selectedPlanId”. Maybe I’m doing something wrong? Here is the code:

monday.execute('openPlanSelection', {
        isInPlanSelection: true,
        selectedPlanId: transformedPlan, // basic-plan / standard-plan / plan-1000 / etc.
      });

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @seriksk1,

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?

posts.author: seriksk1 (Serhii Skorin)
posts.cookedHtml: Done! I hope it will be resolved ASAP, because monetization is always the most important part of the app. Thanks for the response

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for that!

Our team will take a look
